name: list_board_pins
description: Retrieve a paginated list of all pins saved to a specific board. Returns pin details including images, titles, descriptions, and links.

parameters.name: board_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the board.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of pins to return per page (1-250).

parameters.name: bookmark
parameters.description: Cursor token for pagination to fetch the next page.

items.title: Beautiful Sunset Photography
items.description: Stunning sunset at the Pacific coast.
